utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage (with physical and mental health insurance and costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), additional_services (present, but it only states that enhancements are included within categories; it lacks explicit services with costs at this top level), and total_budget (only monthly cost provided; no annual breakdown). Evaluate full specification: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs—fulfilled. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs—fulfilled. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs—fulfilled. 4) additional_services: required 'any enhancement services with costs'—not fulfilled at top level; merely a note, no itemized services and costs. 5) total_budget: required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'—annual cost is missing—not fulfilled. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each plan listed in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings and return their numerical ratings. The final plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health), Preventive Care Package, Specialist Access, EliteHome Premium Coverage, Technology Protection, Home Office Protection, EliteTravel Premium Plan, 24/7 Travel Assistance, and Business Travel Support.
